null_calibration.baseline_zero_rule: Use the objective's absolute floor or its separate zero-mass and positive-scale distances; division by a zero baseline is prohibited.

objectives.aggregation: all rows and hashes must match
objectives.distance: exact byte equality
objectives.estimator: repeat the identical run from the sealed manifest
objectives.minimum_support: every run
objectives.unavailable_rule: failure

objectives.aggregation: all dates and support checks must pass
objectives.distance: violation count
objectives.estimator: Gregorian continuity and registered field-support validator
objectives.minimum_support: every row
objectives.unavailable_rule: failure

objectives.aggregation: all required identities present and hash-valid
objectives.distance: missing or mismatched identity count
objectives.estimator: schema plus SHA-256 validation
objectives.minimum_support: every fit, run, metric, and parent artifact
objectives.unavailable_rule: failure

objectives.aggregation: month then station then mandatory stratum
objectives.distance: Euclidean difference in wet0 and r1mm wet-day proportions
objectives.estimator: Gregorian monthly counts at precipitation greater than 0.0 mm and at least 1.0 mm, each divided by valid days
objectives.minimum_support: 12 observed years and at least 90 percent valid days per retained month
objectives.normalization: null-calibrated observed binomial scale with 0.01 absolute floor
objectives.statistic: monthly wet0 and r1mm wet-day frequency vector
objectives.unavailable_rule: cell unavailable; fewer than two stations makes the stratum fail availability
objectives.uncertainty: moving-block observed bootstrap and paired burn interval

objectives.aggregation: season then station then mandatory stratum
objectives.distance: integrated absolute survival-function difference over durations 1 through 30 days
objectives.estimator: Kaplan-Meier survival at the r1mm threshold with year-boundary spells retained and record edges censored; wet0 is a secondary reported sensitivity
objectives.minimum_support: 50 complete wet spells per season pooled over observed years
objectives.unavailable_rule: season unavailable; no pooling after outcome access
objectives.uncertainty: stationary year-block bootstrap and paired burns

objectives.aggregation: season then station then mandatory stratum
objectives.distance: integrated absolute survival-function difference over durations 1 through 60 days
objectives.estimator: Kaplan-Meier survival at the r1mm threshold with year-boundary spells retained and record edges censored; wet0 is a secondary reported sensitivity
objectives.minimum_support: 50 complete dry spells per season pooled over observed years
objectives.unavailable_rule: season unavailable; no pooling after outcome access
objectives.uncertainty: stationary year-block bootstrap and paired burns

objectives.aggregation: season then station then mandatory stratum
objectives.distance: Euclidean distance over observed wet/dry triplet probabilities after first-order residualization
objectives.estimator: eight r1mm triplet-frequency residuals from the fitted first-order transition surface with wet0 reported as a sensitivity
objectives.minimum_support: 500 valid three-day windows per season
objectives.unavailable_rule: cell unavailable

objectives.aggregation: month then station then mandatory stratum
objectives.distance: absolute log-ratio of positive means
objectives.estimator: arithmetic mean of positive daily precipitation
objectives.minimum_support: 25 observed wet days per month across at least 12 years
objectives.unavailable_rule: cell unavailable; a structurally all-dry month is represented by wet-frequency zero, not an invented amount

objectives.aggregation: month then station then mandatory stratum
objectives.distance: absolute difference in coefficient of variation
objectives.estimator: sample SD divided by mean over positive daily precipitation
objectives.minimum_support: 40 observed wet days per month and positive mean
objectives.unavailable_rule: cell unavailable

objectives.aggregation: season then station then mandatory stratum
objectives.distance: absolute Fisher-z difference
objectives.estimator: Spearman correlation of adjacent positive wet-day amounts
objectives.minimum_support: 100 adjacent-wet pairs per station-season or 25 station pairs plus a frozen hierarchical group with at least 500 pairs
objectives.unavailable_rule: fit_ineligible unless the pre-fit pooling rule applies

objectives.aggregation: season then station then mandatory stratum
objectives.distance: weighted quantile and exceedance-probability distance
objectives.estimator: empirical 0.90, 0.95, and 0.99 quantiles plus generalized-Pareto exceedance diagnostics
objectives.minimum_support: 300 wet days and at least 30 registered threshold exceedances
objectives.normalization: observed median wet amount with 0.1 mm floor
objectives.unavailable_rule: tail component unavailable; body metrics remain separate
objectives.uncertainty: year-block bootstrap with tail-fit interval and paired burns

objectives.aggregation: dry-gap bin then season then station then stratum
objectives.distance: weighted absolute difference in conditional log means
objectives.estimator: mean positive amount following dry gaps of 1, 2-3, 4-7, and 8+ days
objectives.minimum_support: 25 wet events in each retained gap bin
objectives.unavailable_rule: unsupported bins unavailable and reported

objectives.aggregation: month then station then mandatory stratum
objectives.distance: absolute difference in zero-total month probability
objectives.estimator: fraction of complete Gregorian months with zero precipitation
objectives.minimum_support: 12 complete observed years
objectives.unavailable_rule: cell unavailable

objectives.aggregation: month then station then mandatory stratum
objectives.distance: absolute log-ratio of positive monthly means with separate zero mass
objectives.estimator: mean of complete monthly precipitation totals
objectives.minimum_support: 12 complete observed years
objectives.unavailable_rule: zero-only months use the two-part rule

objectives.aggregation: month then station then mandatory stratum
objectives.distance: absolute CV difference with separate zero-only handling
objectives.estimator: sample SD divided by mean of complete monthly totals
objectives.minimum_support: 12 complete observed years and positive monthly mean
objectives.unavailable_rule: zero-only months use zero-mass evidence and have no positive CV

objectives.aggregation: station then mandatory stratum
objectives.distance: Frobenius norm of shrinkage covariance difference
objectives.estimator: Ledoit-Wolf covariance of 12 monthly-total anomalies
objectives.minimum_support: 20 complete observed years
objectives.normalization: observed covariance Frobenius norm with 1 mm squared floor
objectives.unavailable_rule: unavailable below record-length support; never imputed

objectives.aggregation: station then mandatory stratum
objectives.distance: absolute CV difference
objectives.estimator: sample SD divided by mean of complete annual totals
objectives.minimum_support: 12 complete observed years and positive annual mean
objectives.unavailable_rule: station unavailable

objectives.aggregation: station then mandatory stratum
objectives.distance: absolute Fisher-z difference
objectives.estimator: bias-corrected lag-one correlation of annual precipitation anomalies
objectives.minimum_support: 20 complete observed years
objectives.unavailable_rule: unavailable below record-length support

objectives.aggregation: station then stratum
objectives.distance: integrated log-periodogram difference over periods 2 through 15 years
objectives.estimator: multitaper spectrum of detrended annual totals
objectives.minimum_support: 30 complete observed years
objectives.normalization: integrated observed spectral power with numerical epsilon
objectives.unavailable_rule: unavailable for the 2010-2025 USCRN confirmation period

objectives.aggregation: duration then station then mandatory stratum
objectives.distance: weighted relative difference for 1-, 3-, and 5-day annual maxima plus quantile distance
objectives.estimator: annual maxima and L-moment GEV sensitivity with no extrapolated pass/fail beyond observed support
objectives.minimum_support: 15 complete observed years
objectives.normalization: observed median annual maximum with 1 mm floor
objectives.unavailable_rule: duration/site unavailable below support
objectives.uncertainty: year bootstrap, tail-fit interval, and paired burns

objectives.aggregation: season then station then mandatory stratum
objectives.distance: energy distance on log duration
objectives.estimator: USCRN five-minute event segmentation a9_uscrn_event_6h_v1
objectives.minimum_support: 150 valid events per station or 50 station events plus a frozen group with at least 1000 events from five sites
objectives.unavailable_rule: fit_ineligible unless the pre-fit pooling rule applies

objectives.aggregation: season then station then mandatory stratum
objectives.distance: Cramer-von Mises distance on the unit interval plus boundary-mass difference
objectives.estimator: earliest five-minute peak midpoint divided by event duration
objectives.minimum_support: 150 valid events under a9_uscrn_event_6h_v1
objectives.unavailable_rule: station unavailable; a point mass at zero is a measured failure, not repaired

objectives.aggregation: season then station then mandatory stratum
objectives.distance: energy distance on log peak ratio
objectives.estimator: maximum five-minute rate divided by event-mean rate
objectives.minimum_support: 150 valid events under a9_uscrn_event_6h_v1
objectives.unavailable_rule: station unavailable

objectives.aggregation: station then mandatory stratum
objectives.distance: energy distance after rank-normalizing depth, duration, time-to-peak, peak ratio, season, and antecedent dry time
objectives.estimator: joint event-vector empirical distribution
objectives.minimum_support: 200 valid events and 25 events above the registered deep-event threshold
objectives.statistic: joint event descriptor and depth dependence
objectives.unavailable_rule: station unavailable

objectives.aggregation: month then station then mandatory stratum
objectives.distance: Euclidean difference in wet-minus-dry Tmax and Tmin means and SDs
objectives.estimator: daily temperature summaries conditioned on precipitation greater than 0.0 mm
objectives.minimum_support: 100 wet and 100 dry valid days per retained season
objectives.normalization: observed seasonal temperature SD with 0.25 C floor
objectives.statistic: wet/dry-conditioned Tmax and Tmin mean/SD vector
objectives.unavailable_rule: cell unavailable

objectives.aggregation: season then station then stratum
objectives.distance: absolute wet-minus-dry conditional mean difference
objectives.estimator: daily mean relative humidity and derived dew point conditioned on wetness
objectives.minimum_support: 200 wet and 200 dry overlapping valid days
objectives.normalization: observed seasonal SD with 1 percentage-point or 0.25 C floor
objectives.unavailable_rule: variable/site unavailable; station-contract values are not substituted

objectives.aggregation: season then station then stratum
objectives.distance: absolute wet-minus-dry daily-energy mean difference
objectives.estimator: sum of valid five-minute global solar flux times interval duration by local-standard day
objectives.minimum_support: 200 wet and 200 dry days with at least 90 percent valid five-minute solar intervals
objectives.normalization: observed seasonal daily-energy SD with 0.1 MJ/m2 floor
objectives.unavailable_rule: cell unavailable

objectives.aggregation: season then station then stratum
objectives.distance: absolute wet/event-minus-dry wind-speed mean and upper-quantile difference
objectives.estimator: USCRN 1.5 m five-minute wind aggregated by local-standard day and event
objectives.minimum_support: 200 wet/event and 200 dry valid days; good QC flag only
objectives.normalization: observed seasonal wind-speed SD with 0.1 m/s floor
objectives.unavailable_rule: wind direction is unavailable and 1.5 m speed is not converted to 10 m

objectives.aggregation: winter season then station then cold stratum
objectives.distance: absolute difference in precipitation fraction on mean-air-temperature at or below 0 C days
objectives.estimator: precipitation sum on cold-context days divided by winter precipitation sum
objectives.minimum_support: 12 complete winters and positive winter precipitation
objectives.unavailable_rule: cell unavailable; explicitly not a rain/snow partition

objectives.aggregation: winter season then station then cold stratum
objectives.distance: absolute difference in annual transition count
objectives.estimator: count sign changes of daily mean air temperature across 0 C after excluding missing days
objectives.minimum_support: 12 complete winters with at least 90 percent valid days
objectives.unavailable_rule: cell unavailable; explicitly not soil freeze/thaw

objectives.aggregation: winter season then station then cold stratum
objectives.distance: absolute Fisher-z correlation difference
objectives.estimator: Spearman correlation of daily precipitation and mean air temperature on winter wet days
objectives.minimum_support: 100 winter wet days over at least 12 winters
objectives.unavailable_rule: station unavailable
